chunks.text: University of California at Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Sciences Instructional Support Group /share/b/pub/cyberduck.help
Sep 2, 2010 Cyberduck (http://cyberduck.ch/) is a browser and editor for Macs. Cyberduck is installed on the MacPros in 200 Sutardja-Dai Hall. For a list of the computers, please see http://inst.
r a list of the computers, please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst/iesglabs.html EECS Instructional Support 378/384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
